case_title: MARC GERARDO ET AL VS. LARRY WONG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GERARDO, MARC GERARDO, DANEIL AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, LARRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF GERARDO, MARC GERARDO, DANEIL AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, LARRY
DECLARATION OF MARC GERARDO RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF GERARDO, MARC GERARDO, DANEIL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-10-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-10-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS WERE PRESENT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-10-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-11-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $110.00 SERVED DEC-09-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, LARRY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GERARDO, MARC GERARDO, DANEIL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, LARRY $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,225.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT OF $7,000 OF THE JUDGMENT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN MARCH 30, 2016, TRANSFER FULL COPYRIGHT OWNERSHIP TO ALL PHOTOS TAKEN AT PLAINTIFFS' WEDDING ON OCTOBER 12, 2013, TO PLAINTIFFS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
